posts.title: THE UNITED STATES TRADE DEFICIT HAS BEEN REDUCED BY 78% BECAUSE OF THE TARIFFS BEING CHARGED TO OTHER COMPANIES AND COUNTRIES. IT WILL GO INTO POSITIVE TERRITORY DURING THIS YEAR, FOR THE FIRST TIME IN MANY DECADES. THANK YOU FOR YOUR ATTENTION TO THIS MATTER!

posts.title: It is my Great Honor to nominate Justin Smith to serve as Judge on the United States Court of Appeals for the Eighth Circuit in Missouri. Justin is a very Smart and Talented Attorney, who received his J.D. from the University of Missouri School of Law, and is the Co-Owner of the James D. Otis Law Group. Justin has defended many of my Common Sense and Popular Policies, like Energy Dominance and Keeping Men Out of Women’s Sports. Justin also played a BIG role in securing a Supreme Court Landmark Victory on Presidential Immunity. He is a true America First Fighter, who will continue to deliver strong results for the American People. Congratulations Justin!

posts.title: I am pleased to nominate Tony Powell to serve as Judge on the United States District Court for the District of Kansas. Tony currently serves as Kansas’ Solicitor General and, previously, distinguished himself as a Judge on the Kansas Court of Appeals, and four term Kansas State Representative, where he served as the Chairman on the Ethics and Elections Committee. Tony received his J.D. from Washburn University School of Law, and B.A. from George Washington University. He is Highly Respected for his extensive appellate and trial experience, and his unwavering commitment to upholding the Rule of Law, and protecting our Constitution. I am confident that Tony will continue to protect the Integrity of our Legal System in his new role. Congratulations Tony!

posts.title: It is my Honor to nominate Tony Mattivi to serve as Judge on the United States District Court for the District of Kansas. Tony is Highly Qualified, currently serving as the Director of the Kansas Bureau of Investigation and, previously, as an Assistant U.S. Attorney in Kansas for more than 20 years, where he focused on National Security and Anti Terrorism cases. Tony received his J.D. from Washburn University School of Law, and B.S. from Metropolitan State College in Denver. Tony’s vast experience has prepared him well to serve the Great People of Kansas, and restore LAW and ORDER. Congratulations Tony!

posts.title: I am pleased to announce that I am nominating Jeffrey Kuhlman to serve as Judge on the United States District Court for the District of Kansas. A proud Graduate of Kansas State University, and George Mason University School of Law, Jeff brings tremendous experience to the role, and will do a fantastic job for the Great People of Kansas, a State I won three times! He is currently a Partner at Watkins Calcara in Great Bend, Kansas, where he practices complex Commercial and Civil Litigation, and previously served as a Law Clerk to Judge Eric Melgren. Jeff is TOUGH and SMART, and will tirelessly defend our Constitution in this new position. Congratulations Jeff!

posts.title: The Commission of Fine Arts just approved, unanimously, 6 to 0, with one recusal because he had a conflict in that he worked professionally on the job, the White House Ballroom. Great accolades were paid to the building’s beauty and scale. Thank you to the members of the Commission! President DJT

posts.title: We are going to have the Save America Act, one way or the other, after approval by Congress through the very proper use of the Filibuster or, at minimum, by a Talking Filibuster, à la “Mr. Smith Goes to Washington.” SAVE AMERICA ACT! 1. ALL VOTERS MUST SHOW VOTER I.D. (IDENTIFICATION!). 2. ALL VOTERS MUST SHOW PROOF OF CITIZENSHIP IN ORDER TO VOTE. 3. NO MAIL-IN BALLOTS (EXCEPT FOR ILLNESS, DISABILITY, MILITARY, OR TRAVEL!).
posts.text:
We are going to have the Save America Act, one way or the other, after approval by Congress through the very proper use of the Filibuster or, at minimum, by a Talking Filibuster, à la “Mr. Smith Goes to Washington.”
 
SAVE AMERICA ACT!
 
1. ALL VOTERS MUST SHOW VOTER I.D. (IDENTIFICATION!).
 
2. ALL VOTERS MUST SHOW PROOF OF CITIZENSHIP IN ORDER TO VOTE.
 
3. NO MAIL-IN BALLOTS (EXCEPT FOR ILLNESS, DISABILITY, MILITARY, OR TRAVEL!).

posts.title: Just left Coosa Steel Plant, in Rome, Georgia, which is now working 24 hours around the clock, after it was down to just one hour a year ago. It is like that up and down throughout the Country — Companies are thriving because of TARIFFS. The United States of America has taken in Hundreds of Billions of Dollars, and quadrupled (at least) National Security, all as a result of the Economy Saving TARIFFS!
